executive_summary: Sales for week ending 16 May 2026 totalled 368,436 inc VAT.

Total waste of 7,270 recorded across all departments.
biggest_wins: Strong poultry and produce sales recorded.
Waste within acceptable range for the week.
biggest_risks: Deli cost of sales elevated this week.
department_callouts: Produce: strong week with good margin.
Meat: solid performance across beef and poultry.
Provisions: margin in line with target.
action_plan: Review deli cost of sales with department manager.
Monitor fish margin closely next week.
